context: Tests whether the response correctly explains the technical differences between git rebase and git merge with accurate tradeoffs.

checklist.name: Explains merge creates a merge commit
checklist.description: States that git merge creates a merge commit that joins two branch histories

checklist.name: Explains rebase replays commits
checklist.description: States that git rebase replays/moves commits onto a new base, creating new commit hashes

checklist.name: Mentions history linearity tradeoff
checklist.description: Notes that rebase produces a linear history while merge preserves the branching structure

checklist.name: Warns about rebase on shared branches
checklist.description: Warns against rebasing commits that have been pushed/shared, as it rewrites history

checklist.name: No incorrect information
checklist.description: Response does not contain factually wrong statements about git internals or behavior
